untranslatable_reason: Gravestone doji pattern detection requires multi-candle pattern recognition (small body, long upper wick, minimal lower wick) which cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. Descending triangle detection requires identifying multiple swing points and trendline validation, which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal relies on visual chart pattern analysis that transcends point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using bar properties (upper_wick, lower_wick, body_pct) to approximate doji characteristics, but true gravestone doji and descending triangle pattern detection requires pattern recognition logic outside the scope of allowed indicators. Exit condition uses mean reversion (close crossing above SMA_20) as a reasonable reversal trigger for short positions.
